title: Ginger Soya Chicken

instructions_list: Heat up oil and saute garlics, white parts of spring onion and ginger till fragrant.ŌüŻ
Add in marinated chicken with the light soya sauce and mix well.ŌüŻ
Followed by the rest of the seasoning and allow the sauce to cook on high heat.ŌüŻ
Add in green parts of spring onions.
When sauce has thickened, add in shaoxing wine and remove from heat.ŌüŻServe hot immediately with rice.
